name: meterpreter-migrate
description: Tier-1 external-attacker validation. Meterpreter (Metasploit) migrates its session into TestTarget.exe. Framework provides target + telemetry; the operator drives the migrate from msfconsole while Run-PPLExperiment waits at an interactive prompt.

extra.notes: External attacker: Metasploit windows/x64/meterpreter/reverse_tcp session, migrate <targetPid>. Reflective DLL injection: OpenProcess -> VirtualAllocEx -> WriteProcessMemory (payload + reflective loader) -> CreateRemoteThread.
